task_description: Build a multi-interactive dashboard website (mydash-dashboard-builder) that uses Google Docs as system prompts to generate dashboards. The system loads two Google Docs (Data Reconciliation and Dashboard Builder), injects product variables, executes MCP-based data extraction and reconciliation, then builds and deploys interactive dashboards. Tech stack: Next.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, SQLite/Prisma, Redis, BullMQ, Docker Compose.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds with all routes/pages generated. All 69 tests pass (6 suites). Seed script completes. Docker compose config validates. Docker build skipped due to no Docker daemon in sandbox. v2 code review APPROVED. All critical security issues addressed (auth, XSS, content-type validation). Branch: feature/google-docs-prompt-dashboard-builder ready for push.
